title: Oldden Berry
description: Modpack designed to recreate 5th century feel with realism and a bit less fantasies, create armies and economy's defeat your enemies with calavery and more
body:
What dose this mod add -

Realistic 5th century factors such as weapons, armor agracutlure and horse buffs
removes alot of the "magical" parts of the game like the nether and end to focus more on player diplomacy and progression 

+ Why our mod? -

Monthly updates, discord community and other additions such as voted in features and collabs

+ Other things before you download -

this is highly unstable right now has alot of crashes needs a bit of polishing so beware of loads of crashes
